commands.review_summary:
The branch makes local-model lean runs synthesize structured Tool Search defaults when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, threads that runtime config through embedded-runner tool cataloging, and documents the new lean-mode behavior.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +85, Docs +2. Total +122 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a PR review; there is no separate current-main bug repro here. Source comparison shows current main lacks the new defaulting helper, and the PR adds focused tests for the changed behavior.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- default `agents.*.experimental.localModelLean` to compact Tool Search controls when no operator `tools.toolSearch` preference is set
- keep explicit `tools.toolSearch` configuration authoritative, including `false`
- document the local-model lean default so small/local model users get a smaller prompt-facing tool catalog without losing tool reachability

Relates to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Lean local-model agents no longer receive a huge direct tool catalog by default when Tool Search can compact it behind `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, and `tool_call`.

Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper, formatting/lint checks, branch autoreview, and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate from this patch series.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Evidence after fix: final refreshed head `1601a72c3167`; focused tests passed with 65/65 tests after rebasing onto current `origin/main`; oxfmt and oxlint passed on the touched files; branch autoreview previously reported no accepted/actionable findings. AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` previously passed with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_261e7f93ddd3`, slug `golden-hermit`, run `run_5ccda3e85dc8`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`.

Observed result after fix: `localModelLean` applies compact Tool Search defaults only when the operator did not configure Tool Search.

What was not tested: Live local model API runs were not rerun in this focused config/defaulting PR.
target.author: vincentkoc
